reviews.title: Disappointing experience – not worthy of 5 stars
reviews.positives: Location and view
reviews.negatives:
Disappointing experience – not worthy of 5 stars

I was very disappointed with my stay at this Novotel hotel. For a 5-star hotel, the quality was far below expectations.

The room was very dusty and felt poorly cleaned. The room size was small, which did not match what I would expect from a hotel of this category.

The TV was outdated and could not connect to YouTube or any smart features. I also tried using HDMI, but it did not work at all, making the TV basically useless.

Overall, the room condition and facilities were not acceptable for a 5-star hotel, and the experience did not match the price or brand reputation. I would not recommend this hotel unless significant improvements are made.

reviews.text:
I joined the New Year’s Eve pre-countdown dinner on 31/12 at Novotel. While the atmosphere and food selection were generally good, I had a disappointing experience. When I went to get dessert, the staff cleared my table completely. When I returned, all my drinks were gone and even the tablecloth had been removed, which made me feel rushed and uncomfortable.
For an event like a countdown dinner, I believe tables should not be cleared unless guests have clearly finished. I hope the hotel can improve service coordination for future events.
reviews.response:
Dear Ong Ai Lee,

Thank you very much for sharing your feedback regarding the New Year’s Eve pre‑countdown dinner at Novotel Danang Premier Han River. While we are pleased to know that you enjoyed the atmosphere and food selection, we are truly sorry to hear about the disappointing experience you encountered when your table was cleared prematurely.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and discomfort this caused. Your comments are very important to us, and we will share them with our team to ensure better coordination and attentiveness during future events. For special occasions such as countdown dinners, we fully agree that tables should only be cleared once guests have clearly finished, and we will reinforce this standard with our staff.

We greatly appreciate your constructive feedback, as it helps us improve our service. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a more enjoyable and seamless experience.

Best Regards,
Tin Nguyen/ Front Office

We were on 29 floor, the night club which is on 36th floor with so loud music everynight that none of us could sleep. Staff at front desk and concierge were not too friendly, we only allowed to exchange $100 US dollar to Dong Vn. Everytime, we asked for directions, the answered always " ask the taxi". One day after a long day hot outside we came back to our room and the room was not being made (4pm) i called the front desk and  was told since my room is on 29 floor, ( suites vip floor) they do it last (?) They normally  do from 1st floor up she said, i told her that didn't make no sense, than she started blaming on the house keeping were too busy , there was no time, she ever said sorry nor offer the service right away for customers. The Hotel by far is not 4 star, and overpriced. I wouldn't come back and wont recommended this to any ones.

reviews.title: Terrible location, Tacky hotel
reviews.text: The lobby looked like the entrance of a cheap mall. The room was clean enough but bathrooms were not. There was a terrible musky smell in the suite like it has been unused in months. The aircon in one room was not working and had to be fixed during our stay. We had a kitchenette in our suite but no towel, sponge or soap to do washing up. The traffic noise was unavoidable all night long. There is a club just down the street and the loud music was unbearable until wee hours of the morning. They offer a shuttle service to the beach but it takes only 10 passengers 4 times a day. So there was often no space and it was hard to catch the bus on time. We ended up taking taxis both ways. It is a 20 min ride, not 10 min like the hotel tells you. The hotel charged a full night's stay for a 6pm checkout, total rip off but we had no choice with 3 young kids.

reviews.title: Ngoài vị trí đẹp ra thì không được gì hết
reviews.text:
Phòng quá cũ, HK tốt, dọn dẹp sạch sẽ. Buffet siêu tệ, 3 ngày liền tôi phải ăn súp lơ; quá ít rau cho bữa sáng. Quầy đồ bún phở ngon (nhân viên nữ chan nước dùng luôn tươi cười với khách) nhưng chả cá siêu bở. Tôm bé bằng ngón tay út, không cắt râu, nấu kiểu hổ lốn lổm ngổm, bên trong con tôm bở bùng bục, tôi tưởng đang được ăn món tôm từ tủ lạnh rã đông. Con trai tôi ở đây 3 ngày và cháu cứ kêu đau bụng, bản thân tôi cũng bị đi ngoài. Nhân viên dọn dẹp bát đũa siêu tệ; dù tôi có để lại đồ cá nhân và bắt chéo dao dĩa hàm ý là tôi chỉ tạm dừng bữa ăn thì họ vẫn thản nhiên dọn sạch bàn của tôi (khi tôi cho em bé đi vệ sinh); đổ hết thức ăn thừa và nhanh chóng setup bàn của tôi từ "bàn đã đặt" chuyển thành "bàn trống.
Ngày thứ nhất và ngày thứ 2 khi lưu trú ở đây tôi đều bị, đến ngày thứ 3 tôi phải ngồi canh tại bàn đề phòng họ lại dọn đồ ăn của tôi đi mất.
Trong thang máy, 2 nhân viên nam ghé tai nhau thì thầm điều gì đó rất không chuyên nghiệp. Khi tôi đến và đi khỏi khách sạn, bộ phận bảo vệ rất hời hợt trong việc giúp vận chuyển hành lý cho chúng tôi, còn thua cả sự nhiệt tình của anh tài xế taxi.
Mang tiếng là thành phố biển nhưng Novotel mang đến cho tôi trải nghiệm như ở trên đảo: rau ít hơn cả Novotel Phú Quốc và có 2 ngày tôi đã ngửi thấy mùi chua trong thức ăn; đặc biệt là món súp lơ xào, mở nắp ra là mùi xộc vào mũi; kiểu ôi thiu ấy.
Dù giá cả đắt hơn nhưng tôi thấy còn thua Novotel và Movenpick Phú Quốc; cùng thuộc chủ là Accor.

reviews.title: Disappointing stay at the Novotel
reviews.text:
For a top rated hotel, I left a bit disappointed with two specific things:

1. Cleanliness of my room. Lipstick on cups from previous guests.  
2. Phone not working - had to use the one in the toilet!
3. Given the higher end of hotels in the centre of Danang it was a struggle to make myself understood (in English) by staff, particularly when trying to order room service.  

Aside from this, the hotel has an impressive night club on the top floor, fantastic all around views of the City and the river.  Superb entrance/lobby with very nice smell.

The above points i’ve made have made it difficult to award 5 stars on this review and would make me think twice about re-booking here in the future.
reviews.response:

Pros:
1) Good Location with a really nice view of the dragon bridge

Cons:

reviews.title: 5 star by the old OLD standards
reviews.text:
I’m travelling with my parents as a family of 3, and were sorely disappointed with the old facilities. The pool was 25m with huge steps down, making it even less spacious despite not that many people around. I could already smell the damp post cleaning off-putting smell stepping into our deluxe room. And the lighting system was NOT making any senses at all, as you would have to turn on the whole room light in order for the bathroom one to be on (ie. waking everyone else whenever you need to go to the toilet). Ba Na Hills wow-pass package was decent, with return ticket for free shuttle bus back to hotel. However, when we showed up at pick up time from Ba Na for the hotel, bus was packed and the next scheduled bus was ‘unknown’? 
The only highlights were the gym (properly and fully equipped) and the breakfast buffet (decent with healthy options). Otherwise, not worth the extra money (anymore), especially with Mercure, Marriot or Melia around.

reviews.title: Great Location and Property, but Indian  Food Needs Significant Improvement
reviews.text:
We recently stayed at Novotel Premier Han River Da Nang and overall had a pleasant experience. The hotel’s location is excellent, offering beautiful views of the Han River and easy access to the city’s major attractions. The property itself is well-maintained, modern, and comfortable, making it a great choice for both families and business travelers.

The rooms were spacious, clean, and equipped with all the necessary amenities. The staff were courteous and helpful throughout our stay.

However, one area that needs considerable improvement is the Indian food. As Indian travelers, we found the Indian dishes served at the hotel to be disappointing in terms of authenticity, taste, and overall quality. The flavors were far from what one would expect from Indian cuisine, and the food did not meet the standards of an international hotel of this caliber.

While the location, facilities, and service deserve praise, we hope the management takes feedback regarding Indian cuisine seriously and works towards improving the menu and preparation.

Overall, a very good property in an excellent location, but not the best option if Indian food is an important part of your stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Mohit,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback regarding your recent stay at Novotel Danang Premier Han River.

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our excellent location, beautiful views of the Han River, comfortable accommodations, and the service provided by our team. It is rewarding to hear that you found the property well-maintained, modern, and suitable for both leisure and business travel.

At the same time, we sincerely regret that our Indian cuisine did not meet your expectations. We greatly appreciate your honest comments regarding the authenticity, taste, and overall quality of the dishes served. As we strive to cater to the diverse preferences of our international guests, your feedback is invaluable and will be shared with our Culinary team for careful review and improvement.

Thank you once again for your constructive feedback and for recognizing the positive aspects of your stay. We truly appreciate your support and hope to have

reviews.title: It is necessary to review the communication and situation handling of employees with customers.
reviews.text: Hello. We stayed at the Novotel Danang for 5 nights. Overall, I find everything relatively okay regarding the room and related services. However, there is one thing that left a negative impression about your hotel, and I would like to provide specific feedback: the parking lot for cars is quite small, making it inconvenient for daily parking. On the last night of our stay, there were quite a few cars, and when we returned to the hotel, we had to wait and the security arranged a rather inconvenient spot for us in the basement B1. (at the request of security) we complied, even though the parking space was small and we had difficulty getting in and out of the car. But I think it's not a major issue. Until 11:30 PM, when we went down to get something from the car and intended to go back to our room, a security guard and a manager came out and asked us to move our car to another spot. We were uncomfortable with this issue. The manager said if we did not move the car, the staff would be moving items and could scratch our car. So why did you arrange for my car to be parked in that position in the afternoon? It wasn't like I parked there myself. And what would you have done if I hadn't gone down to the car at that time? Would you just naturally scratch my car???? The way your manager handled the situation and spoke to the customers, in my opinion, is very poor for a staff member of a 5-star hotel. Therefore, this will be the evaluation I will give your hotel on Agoda, and I will make a note for myself and everyone I know to consider before coming to your hotel because of this really poor experience! Best regards.

reviews.title: My trip to Da Nang June 2017
reviews.text: Before booking through Agoda I called the hotel direct.  For a Superior King Room they wanted twice as much as through Agoda.  When you stay at this hotel you are paying for the lobby and the restaurants and amenities outside the room.  The shower has no door, thus water leaks out on to the bathroom floor.  The in-room phone never worked.  The instructions for using the remote for the  TV are essentially worthless.  The room is so tiny there is virtually no room for luggage.  The balcony and view from the balcony is excellent.  The comfort of the bed is also good, but the room is so small it is extremely cramped.  I've had better rooms in Khe Sanh Town, Vietnam.  When I checked out they tried to charge me for using the phone even after I reported to them multiple times that the phone did not work, even with their assistance in dialing.  The finally agreed to not charge me for the phone.  This hotel is way over priced for the rooms they offer.  Again, you pay for the amenities with a room that has no comfort.  I will not stay here again and I will not recommend this hotel to anyone.  Richard Wilkerson

reviews.text:
First I got to admit, they give us room at 26th floor with big glass door to the balcony which made the room super nice. I sleep looking at beautiful river running thru out the glowing city, I wake up looking at the city in daylight...fantastic. Coming to the unhappy part - the service, there're a few complains:

- I guess they have high standard service and all, the staff is also nice but somehow I feel like they do it like a robot, they don't give me the feeling of being welcome al all.

- They have shuttle bus go to quiet a few places a round the city, but no staff inform us anything about that when we arrive. We only found out about that reading out of a small signboard when we're about to leave.

- It's a bit annoying that they keep ringing the door for several times to check: is the room cleaning good, are you in need of refilling mini-bar... Nice service but there should be a better way to do it rather then disturbing customer resting for several times. 

Anyway, the super view in the room did save the day. The pool and sauna/steambath/jacuzzi are also nice.

reviews.title: Clean and well maintained
reviews.text: We had a good stay for our 4D3N trip to Da Nang. Hotel is easily accessible by car and has a good river view. Rooms are spacious and clean. Breakfast spread is really nice. As we are vegetarians, We were offered additional options too. Plenty of facilities(swimming pool, gym, jacuzzi, sauna etc) and well maintained. Staff are well mannered and polite. However, although we're a family of 3, house keeping always kept only 2 towels. I had to call for the addl set every day. Barring that, our Novotel experience is really good.
reviews.response:
Dear Sasidhar,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback.

We are delighted to hear that you had a pleasant stay during your 4D3N trip and enjoyed our convenient location, beautiful river views, and spacious, clean rooms. It is also wonderful to know that you appreciated our breakfast selection, especially the additional vegetarian options, as well as our facilities and the courteous service from our team.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience regarding the housekeeping arrangement. We understand how frustrating it must have been to request additional towels daily, and your feedback has been shared with our housekeeping team to ensure better attention to room occupancy details moving forward.

Thank you once again for your valuable comments. We are pleased that overall you had a good experience, and we look forward to welcoming you and your family back to Novotel Danang Premier Han River for an even smoother stay.

Warm regards,

reviews.title: Convenient location
reviews.text: Hotel was conveniently located 15 mins from the airport and by Han River.  The staff in the Square restaurant were great and the breakfast buffet fantastic.  While the views from my room were great - it wasn’t until the end of my stay when it was discovered that the reception staff had given me the wrong room to stay.  Luckily I was reimbursed for the cost, and given access to the 29th floor restaurant to have afternoon tea, and wait for my car to the airport.  The only other concern I had was being able to communicate with some of the staff in English.  Language skills weren’t strong there - otherwise the place was good.
reviews.response:

reviews.positives:
조식이 맛있다. 매일 조식 내용이 바뀐다. 2일로 로테이션 된다. 
방이 넓고 욕조가 크다. 용다리 뷰다. 유리병에 든 물을 공짜로 준다. 먹었는데 탈 안났다. 변기가 세개다. 샤워시설도 침대 방마다 있다. 간단한 주방기구가 다 있다.
수영장이랑 헬스장이 무료이다. 헬스장에서 신발도 빌려준다. 유료로 12만동으로 요가를 할 수 있는데 강사님이 영어를 잘 하시고 유쾌하시다. 수영장 뷰가 좋다.
reviews.negatives:
세금 정책이 바뀌어서 이미 결제를 한 방의 가격이 낮아졌는데 환불은 해줄 수 없고 유료 서비스를 이용하라고 했다. 
2월 초에 갔는데 히터가 없어서 추웠다. 
샤워기 필터기 필수. 필터기 색이 회색이 되었다.
등은 거의 간접등이라 밤에는 실내가 밝지 않다.
한시장까지 걸어가려면 20분정도 걸린다. 한시장 앞이라고 보기는 좀 애매하다.
VIP가 오는 날은 호텔 정문에도 후문에도 택시를 세우지 못했다. 
다른 날은 보지 못했는데 VIP온 다음날 밤에 1층에 있는 카지노 앞에 거의 헐벗은 여자들이 서있는것을 보았다..

reviews.title: Overall Nice stay but beware of the broken AC!
reviews.text: This luxurious hotel is pleasant to stay. I got a room on the high floor which overlooked the Han River and the city. Beautiful view! the room was smaller but has everything and the cleanliness is top notch. Staff are nice and helpful! I have a birthday coming up in a couple days and the hotel was kind enough to throw in a birthday cake in the room which was so nice of them. The cake was amazing! Thank you! there is one negative tho: the AC is not working and even tho i adjusted the temp down to  22oC then eventually 18oC, it felt like 30oC to me, kept me awake until 3am because i sweat like crazy in bed, had to call staff to have the maintenance guys come to fix it, still not as cold as i want, esp with Vietnam summer weather! this is on the 27th floor! check your AC and if it is not working have the staff change your room dont be like me! the rooftop bar should be a bar with light music so people can drink beer or cocktails and enjoy the view, not a night club, the music was so loud!

reviews.text:
Hotel seemingly does not have own parking area and have to ask nearby office’s parking area and have to wait to get their approval on parking lot.  
Elevator from basement 2nd go up lobby is from office building .
Hotel with 5 star grade but has no one to take care customer ‘s luggage. We have carried our luggage from basement 2nd up to lobby then take to room .

I liked the hotel alot and the rooms were very modern and everything you would expect from a 5* hotel of this type.
If you are into the gym then this is very modern with extensive equipment.
I think the only downside would be that there was a super big balcony but no furniture on the balcony yet. Shame because the views are fantastic and it would have been lovely to sit and watch the da nang city lights at night. I am sure in time there will be balcony furniture.
All in all a great hotel and great value for money.

reviews.title: Da Nang Novotel
reviews.text:
The location is superb! Walking distance to all of the major attractions and the pricing was reasonable. 

Room was clean and super comfortable. 
Your staff were very professional and courteous in their conduct but upon the day I checked in, I encountered a rather unpleasant front office staff who I felt belittled me because this staff tried to hard sell me tickets to Bana Hills but I told this staff my group of friends will think of it and after I felt that this staff displayed unfriendliness. 

It was totally unacceptable and my group of friends also thought this was not part of the Accor culture of being customer friendly. 

As our room was not ready since we arrived around 1PM, the said staff just brushed us off and said it’s not ready and didn’t advised us what time to come back. 

Instead of directing us to the concierge to place our luggage, this staff totally ignored us and continued with his job. 

I am totally lambasted by this whole total incident and would like your management to retrain your staffs to be more polite and customer oriented.
reviews.response:
Dear Lim,

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your recent stay with us.

We are pleased to know that you appreciated our superb location, comfortable and clean room, as well as the professionalism and courtesy of our team overall. Your kind recognition of these aspects is truly appreciated.

However, we are deeply concerned to learn about your experience at the Front Office upon arrival. Please accept our sincere apologies for the discomfort and frustration caused. The behavior you described—particularly the manner in which the interaction was handled, the perceived lack of courtesy, and the absence of clear guidance while your room was not yet ready—does not reflect the service standards nor the welcoming spirit we strive to uphold, especially as part of the Accor culture.

Your feedback regarding the sales approach and the way it impacted your experience has been taken very seriously. We fully understand how this could have made you and

reviews.title: Novotel Danang
reviews.text: The location was great and the breakfast was delicious. We chose a river view room, and they upgraded our room and even provided a cake for my birthday. However, we were assigned two residence-type rooms. The residence type has different elevators, and only one of the three elevators was operational; the other two were for the office. There was also the inconvenience of having to switch elevators to have breakfast. Additionally, although we reserved both rooms with a river view, one of the upgraded river view rooms actually had a city view. Nevertheless, it was nice to have one room with a living room and more space! I wish they had informed us during check-in if it was okay to change to the residence type against the booking details or if we could change the view of the room in exchange for the upgrade. Thank you.
reviews.response:
Dear Jihyun,

Thank you very much for choosing Novotel Danang Premier Han River and for sharing your detailed review with us. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our downtown location, delicious breakfast, river view, and the birthday cake celebration arranged for you. It is wonderful to hear that these touches contributed positively to your stay.

At the same time, we sincerely regret the inconvenience caused by the residence-type room assignment, elevator access, and the change in room view. We understand how important it is to provide clear information at check-in, and we apologize for not communicating these changes in advance. Your feedback is very valuable, and we will use it to improve our processes and ensure a smoother experience for our guests in the future.

We truly appreciate your constructive comments and your overall rating of 8.4/10. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with an even more seamless and enjoyable stay.

Best Regards,
Ti

reviews.title: Great location and service, but facilities need an upgrade
reviews.text:
Novotel Danang has always been my favorite place to stay whenever I travel to Da Nang for work. The location is unbeatable — right by the Han River with stunning views, especially at sunset. The staff are warm, professional, and always make check-in and check-out smooth and pleasant.

However, after several years of staying here, I’ve noticed that the facilities are showing signs of wear. The sun loungers on the balcony are rusty, the towels have lost their color, and both the bed and pillows are no longer as comfortable as they used to be.

It’s still a convenient and reliable choice, but I do hope the hotel considers some upgrades soon. Next time, I might try the Courtyard Marriott Han River for comparison.
reviews.response:
Dear Ngan,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at Novotel Danang Premier Han River. We are pleased to hear that you continue to appreciate our prime location and the attentive service provided by our staff. Your positive remarks about our team will certainly be shared with them, as they strive to create memorable experiences for our guests.

We also acknowledge your concerns regarding the condition of certain facilities. While we are glad that you find our hotel to be a convenient choice, we understand the importance of maintaining high standards in all aspects of our accommodation. Your observations about the sun loungers, towels, and bedding have been duly noted, and we will take them into consideration for future improvements.

We hope to welcome you back for a more satisfying experience in the future.

Best regards,
Tino Le - Duty Manger
Novotel Danang Premier Han River

reviews.title: I hope you are doing well.
reviews.text: The location is somewhat detached from the Antuong area or the central market of Han market, so there are some limitations regarding food and shopping in the surrounding area. However, the soundproofing, cleanliness, breakfast, and amenities are all good. As someone sensitive to noise, I am satisfied. The location is such that in Da Nang, using Grab, it doesn't take long to get to the city center from most places excluding tourist spots, and the fare is not too high, so using Grab seems like a good option. However, the water quality is not great, so be sure to bring a shower filter. After just 2-3 days, the shower filter you bring will turn brown. Also, the bedding tends to be a bit damp. Some rooms do have a smell coming from the air conditioner filter, but I believe if you request from the hotel, they can change your room or clean the air conditioner filter. The staff's friendliness is also not extremely warm; it’s more of a moderately distant kind of kindness. I actually prefer this over excessive friendliness, as it doesn't invade my privacy. Overall, it is a reasonably comfortable hotel to stay in.
reviews.response:
Dear SungGeun,

Warm greetings from Novotel Danang Premier Han River!

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your experience with us. We truly appreciate your detailed and balanced feedback—it helps us understand what we’re doing well and where we can improve.

We’re glad to hear that you were satisfied with the soundproofing, cleanliness, breakfast, and overall facilities, especially as someone sensitive to noise. It’s also great to know that you found Grab to be a convenient option for getting around Da Nang, even with our location being a bit removed from the An Thuong area and Han Market.

We sincerely apologize for the concerns you experienced regarding water quality, bedding humidity, and air conditioning. Your comments have been shared with our engineering and housekeeping teams for immediate review. reviews.text:
Everthing was excellent except the receptionists.  Before arriving the hotels, I checked the website and saw a few single rooms available but when I arrived, the receptionist told me only the suites were available at the higher price.  Doubt about it, I checked the website again and there were still a few single rooms available.  This time I booked it on the website and gave her my booking number so she had no reason to push me to pay higher price fot the suite.
When I was checking out and ready to get my deposit back, the receptionist told me she was short of 20,000 đồng (vietnamese currency) and asked me to waive it.  It's not a big amount of money but it made me think the receptionist tried to get money from customer by forcing customer to book the room at higher price at first and then refused to return the full deposit back with the reason of not having enough change.  I could tip for her more than that amount when I was done but this was a bad attitude of a receptionist.

reviews.title: Great stay, best hotel in Da Nang
reviews.text: It was pouring during our stay in Da Nang but Novotel was so comfortable that we didn't mind staying inside during our trip. Friendly staff, amazing views, lovely room - I would definitely recommend it. They even had a free shuttle to the airport which most hotels don't offer. A few criticisms - our shampoo/body gel weren't refilled on a daily basis, the kids meal "cheeseburger" on the in-room dining menu was literally a burger with cheese inside (very confusing for a foreigner who expects beef in their cheeseburger), and they wouldn't allow us to sit in their level 4 restaurant for drinks because they said they were doing their lunch service even though there was no one in the restaurant and it was past lunchtime.

reviews.positives: the staff from the fitness were amazing(especially on of the boys and the cleaner lady we gave them chocolates)   I am not sure their names they were friendly/helpful they are the people you need in your hotel
reviews.negatives: reception staff not helpful, bed sheets with holes disappointing

reviews.title: comfortable stay
reviews.text: The stay was very pleasant and nice with excellent service by staff
reviews.positives: spa, location, view

reviews.title: Our first visit to Da Nang
reviews.negatives: The room. The TV was at a height lower than the bed. It was impossible to see TV while lying down on the bed. Also, the TV was somewhat small for the size of the room. The room also did not have much storage space compared to the next door room (room 2423 where our friends were staying). Normally the corner room is better compared to the other rooms. There was also no seating in the balcony unlike room 2323.

reviews.title: Fantastic room with a matching view
reviews.text: Every aspect of this hotel spells quality - except the Room Service Breakfast. It took several minutes and two phone calls to clarify that I wanted my eggs 'poached'. That's exactly what I go; two poached eggs on a single piece of toast. They arrived without anything extra; plenty of butter, a plate, napkin but no extra toast and my wife's order of fruit, yoghurt and muesli arrived without the muesli!  This was a very mean breakfast; coffee, juice, jams etc was all extra. Small things I know but very disappointing when you book into a renowned western style hotel primarily for the food!! We had been hanging out for a western breakfast after 6 months of travelling in Vietnam. Novatel - you should do better!
reviews.positives: Room, the view, the staff

reviews.title: Noisy
reviews.positives: We had booked a corner suite which was really spacious and comfortable. We were looking forward to staying in that room, but the noise from a discotheque next door was so deafening (bass) that we had to move room. The staff was very helpful and understanding and I kind of felt sorry for them. Breakfast on the club floor was very pleasant, nice staff there, too. The hotel also helped us to organize a trip to Hoi An. It is really a nice hotel and a great location along the river, if it wasn't for the discotheque.
reviews.negatives: The noise of the discotheque next door is beyond any acceptable level. The bass noise is deafening and it is really impossible to sleep. We had moved from the corner suite to a much smaller room on the other side, but the noise was only slightly less. Apparently, the manager had contacted the police one evening - they came by and found the noise level acceptable.... I cannot understand how the city allows a business in the central hotel district to be so noisy without anybody stopping it. I think Novotel will need to have a serious word with the city counsel about this or they will lose customers.

reviews.negatives: Danang was really warm and it didnt help that the common facilities like the lobby and the gym were centrally controlled for temperature. Machines were also wet from the sweat from other gym users.  Waiting time at the lobby was really too long and waiting time for each guest to clear took a long time.

reviews.title: As a Google Lv9 reviewer, I have been to many hotels, but it is rare to find a 5-star hotel with such good value for money.
reviews.text:
To the right of the lobby entrance is the check-in counter, and to the left, there is an escalator that leads to the conference room on the second floor. After passing the escalator, you will find the guest elevator, and to the right of the elevator on the first floor are the restrooms and the café and restaurant.

There is a casino near the lobby entrance.

The room type I booked was a superior room with a balcony and a river view. Despite being on the lower end of the room types, the view was good, and I was quite satisfied throughout my stay.

Inside the room, there are two fire masks for use in case of fire, along with a bathrobe, slippers, hangers, an iron, and an ironing board. There is also a full-length mirror, a luggage rack, a safe in the side cabinet, a laundry basket, a non-woven laundry bag (and yes, you may take the non-woven bag and slippers), as well as a price list underneath where you can find shoe polishing supplies.

When you lower the blinds in the shower room, the view between the room and the shower is blocked, and there is a fixed hairdryer that has decent wind pressure, but there is no separate power outlet inside the bathroom.

Amenities like toothpaste, toothbrush, and shower caps are provided, but like in other hotels, they cut costs by offering refillable soap, hand wash, and body lotion, while the shampoo, conditioner, and body wash are fixed in the shower.

I forgot to take a note of the amenity brand, but the scent wasn’t cheap and was quite acceptable.

The bathroom has a manually operated bidet with a hose, which is practically used for toilet cleaning.

The refrigerator was cool, but it had no freezing function.

The minibar is not complimentary; scanning the QR code nearby shows prices that are usually more than twice the market rate.

There is a coffee pot and a tea set.

The bed is moderately soft, and the mattress is thick, so shorter individuals might need to climb onto the bed or use a ladder! The bedding is very soft, breathable, warm, and of luxurious material.

The room is said to be 29m2, but it doesn't feel small. It feels more spacious than the same size rooms in Pattaya.

There is a long-stay studio with an entrance at the door opposite the lobby entrance. The best view is the corner panorama view, which shows a cool sight from the Dragon Bridge to the river.

The terrace is quite spacious, enough for sun loungers. Privacy with the adjacent room is also guaranteed.

I didn't apply for breakfast when making the reservation, but I paid 360,000 VND at check-in. At the entrance of the breakfast area, there are fruit, kimbap, and bibimbap where you can add your ingredients to mix it yourself. Alongside this, there are Korean menu items like tteokbokki and japchae, vegetable stir-fry, fried noodles, and meat selections. There is also an egg corner, sausages, bacon, etc. 

Since it’s a Vietnamese noodle country, there is naturally a noodle corner and a corner for banh mi and traditional Vietnamese dishes, vegetables, steamed dishes, and dim sum. Mango and passion fruit shakes, tea and desserts, vegetables and cheese, ham, smoked items, cereal, yogurt, and a variety of breads, pancakes, and muffins are provided as well. The breakfast is rated quite well.

The gym has a separate yoga space, is quite spacious, has various equipment, many cardio machines, and a Han River view.

There is also a sauna next to the gym, which has a sauna room, a Finnish-style sauna, a wet sauna, a shower room, a restroom, and a jacuzzi, separated for men and women.

Going down one level via stairs or taking the elevator leads you to the swimming pool, which has a nice view and is spacious.

The filter on the third day was a bit murky, possibly because it rained throughout the period. The showerhead already installed was a bit old, had weak water pressure, and staff recommended taking your own showerhead due to the split water flow from the pressure.

*Pros:
- A superior room with a balcony and river view, including breakfast, costs less than 130,000 won... comparable to Hilton in Pattaya, but at half the price!
- Breakfast is quite good; do not hesitate to include it to avoid the hassle of going out to eat.
- Location is great, only 20 minutes from the airport.
- There is an ATM express from VP Bank with no withdrawal fee about 1km away. You can withdraw 20 million VND at once here, while other ATMs only allow 2 million at a time, so you have to make multiple withdrawals.
- The room faces north towards Hai Van, giving a nice view of where the river meets

reviews.title: Advantages and disadvantages of Novotel.
reviews.text:
1. The bedding and room condition are very good, clean and no bugs.
2. The staff are very friendly and kind.
3. It's great that the boarding place for the cruise is right in front.
4. The soundproofing is good, so it was very quiet for three days.
5. The river view is nice and open, and there is a balcony.

Cons:
1. There is some construction noise nearby, so it can be heard.
2. It's a bit hot to walk to the market, so taking a taxi is necessary.
3. It takes a long time to use the elevator, especially during the busy morning and evening hours.
4. I made my decision based on the pool, and it was fun, but I was shocked by the water quality when swimming at night.
5. The path to the pool is connected with the breakfast buffet, making it complicated.

Thank you again for having taken the time to share with us your latest experience at Novotel Danang Premier Han River. We regret to hear about the unfortunate incidents that occurred during your stay. On behalf of our teams, please allow me to express my sincerest apology. 

Regarding about the noise of the river boats: we couldn't do much as it is not under our control and of course our Management already take record and if they are continue to have that noise level after 11pm then we will send the letter to the Government to inform accordingly. We have well taken note your comment and we will make sure to assign you to a quiet room for next visit accordingly.

We sincerely hope that this experience will not impair your confidence to staying in Accor hotels in our region. Should you decide to return to Danang please feel free to contact me directly to ensure that your stay is this time around a memorable one.
 
Sincerely,
 
Kate Nguyen
Guest Experience Manager
